name: @ptdl/plugin-line-generator
displayName.vi-VN: Bộ sinh dòng theo quy tắc
description: Rule-based line generator: from one parent record + a rule table, generate N child rows in a single transaction (snapshot, not live). One config covers BOM explosion, commission split, cost allocation — differ only by config. Dynamic relation resolution (based_on/recipient), match across relations, required-null skip, group+sum, largest-remainder rounding, guard + parent bookkeeping. Reuses the formula engine.
